name: Peking Duck Bone Soup
recipeIngredient: Bones from 1 Peking duck (carcass, neck, gizzard, wings, leg & thigh bones)
Peking duck bone broth (6 cups, or adjust with chicken broth or water if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the bones from a Peking duck (carcass, neck, gizzard, wings, leg & thigh bones) in water to cover for 45 minutes.
2. Season the simmered broth with 1 scallion and 1 ginger slice.
3. Heat oil in a soup kettle.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except bean thread, ham slices, and MSG (if used).
5. Stir-fry until cabbage is tender, about 3 minutes.
6. Bring the soup to a boil, then add bean thread, ham slices, and MSG.
7. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
